generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: https://w3id.org/DTDF# .
@prefix base: http://example.org/base# .

instance HorizontalMotorControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise control of horizontal cart movement along gantry rail",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VerticalMotorControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise control of vertical hoisting operations",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ElectromagnetControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of electromagnet for container pickup and release",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of crane motion using kinematic model"
]

instance TrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of optimal movement paths using kinematic model"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic assessment of digital model accuracy against physical crane"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of system states for visualization"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical operational metrics for analysis"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder to monitor hoist swing dynamics"
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of operational metrics for historical data logging",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for persistent storage of operational metrics",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance CraneStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operational metrics stored in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of crane motion using kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation of optimal movement paths using kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of crane parameters for optimal control",
    DTDFVocab:provides HorizontalMotorControl, VerticalMotorControl, ElectromagnetControl
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic assessment of digital model accuracy against physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of system states for visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulating crane motion using kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for computing optimal movement paths using kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time optimal control of crane parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of digital model accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for interactive monitoring of system states using CAD and C4 models",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for configuration and control of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance HorizontalMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for horizontal cart movement along gantry rail"
]

instance VerticalMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vertical hoisting operations"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and release"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for real-time data acquisition and control of sensor inputs"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, ControlEnabler, ValidationEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for visualizing system architecture through context and container diagrams",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for cyber-physical research",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, HorizontalMotor, VerticalMotor, Electromagnet, CADModel, KinematicModel, C4Model, TimescaleDB, SimulationEnabler, TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, ControlEnabler, ValidationEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler, HMI, HistoricalDataLoggingService, SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application executes trajectory commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service via Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane. Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectories against simulations, triggering operator alerts if discrepancies exceed thresholds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing Docker containerization for component isolation and deployment. It follows an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, integrating components through message-based communication."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements of executed trajectories against simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics (e.g., Euclidean) and comparing deviations against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity and data accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol facilitates communication between services via MQTT Broker; TimescaleDB and Grafana handle data storage and visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer, with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services containerized using Docker. Docker Compose is employed for orchestrating these containerized components. No cloud or edge deployment infrastructure is mentioned, and computational/storage requirements are not explicitly specified beyond standard personal computer hardware."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar uses AutomationML for digital twin modeling and Microsoft Azure tools. GreenhouseDT implements ActiveMQ (MQTT protocol) for messaging, InfluxDB (SQL-based time-series database), and containerization via Docker. The Gantry Crane system adopts MQTT for communication protocols, SQL for data storage and querying, and Docker for containerized deployment to ensure interoperability."
]
